summary: Shipping quotes were delayed because a third-party carrier API had intermittent timeouts.

severity.rationale: Customer-facing degradation or high error rate in an important flow.

evidence.text: Shipping quotes were delayed because a third-party carrier API had intermittent timeouts.
Customers saw delayed shipping quotes during checkout, but orders could still be completed.

contributing_factors.description: Missing retry backoff caused requests to wait too long before failing over to cached quotes.

evidence.text: The carrier API dependency returned intermittent timeout errors. Missing retry backoff caused requests to wait too long before failing over to cached quotes.

action_items.description: Add an alert for carrier API timeout rate.

evidence.text: Add an alert for carrier API timeout rate.
Customers saw delayed shipping quotes during checkout, but orders could still be completed.

action_items.description: Document fallback behavior for shipping quote dependencies.

evidence.text: Document fallback behavior for shipping quote dependencies.

supporting_evidence.text: Customers saw delayed shipping quotes during checkout, but orders could still be completed.
The carrier API dependency returned intermittent timeout errors. Missing retry backoff caused requests to wait too long before failing over to cached quotes.
The team adjusted timeout and retry settings and verified cached quote fallback behavior.

16:11 UTC - Support reported delayed shipping quotes. | 16:17 UTC - Engineers confirmed elevated timeout errors from the carrier API. | 16:29 UTC - Timeout threshold and retry settings were adjusted. | 16:43 UTC - Shipping quote latency returned to normal.
